revert_reason: s_prefetch_data adds overhead > benefit for 4-quad rows on gfx1201
notes: Base kernel already 4x-unrolled; prefetch overhead dominates at 4 quads per row (544B stride)

change_summary: 8x group unroll + packed uint32 loads, no s_prefetch (replaces 2x byte-load attempt)
revert_reason: Median 93.2 tok/s vs baseline 93.1: delta +0.1%, within noise (stddev 0.05). gfx1201 at GDDR6 bandwidth ceiling with base 4x unroll; 8x unroll adds no measurable ILP gain. Kernel file retained as artifact.
notes: 5 trials: 97.6/93.1/93.1/93.2/93.2. Trial 1 outlier (JIT/thermal). Stable median 93.2. Acceptance threshold was 95.0.
